content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî after iter-013

## Closest to completion (prioritize)
1. **‚òÖ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf`** (SGR ~L2458) ‚Äî the single live crux of the whole assoc chain. Closing it auto-cleans B4 (`tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor`) AND B5 (`tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`) to axiom-clean. Route is FULLY documented in the sorry body and NOT blocked by any missing ingredient:
   - Unfold `tensorObjAssoc` to its 5-segment `tensorObjIso`/`Œ±_` composite.
   - Rewrite the 3 sheafified-presheaf maps: `L(Œ∑_P‚ñ∑Q)` via `Localization.Monoidal.Œº_natural_left`; `L(P'‚óÅŒ∑_Q)` via `Œº_natural_right`; `L(Œ±^p)` via `associator_hom_app`; with `L(Œ∑_P) = Œµ_{LP}‚Åª¬π` (`sheafification_map_unit_eq`, proven this iter).
   - Cancel adjacent `Œº`/`tensorObjIso` pairs (full-defeq `simp only` recipe of `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`), leaving canonical `Œ±_` (`rfl`).
   - **MANDATORY technique:** every `Œº`-conjugation/cancellation hits the `restrictScalars(ùüô)` decoration at the `Œº`-second-index ‚Üí use `erw`/term-mode at each junction (the exact recipe just proven on the B4 reduction). Plain `rw`/`Category.assoc`/`Functor.map_comp` will FAIL with "did not find pattern". Do NOT re-attempt standalone `Œº`-bridge helper lemmas (they resisted clean `rw`/`exact` for this reason and were removed) ‚Äî assemble inline.
2. **B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc`** (SGR ~L2768) ‚Äî INDEPENDENT of ‚òÖ/B4; can run in the same lane or parallel. Induction on `m` (analogue of `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`), step from `MonoidalCategory.pentagon`.

## Then
3. **B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`** (SGR ~L2798) ‚Äî final assoc leg; assemble after ‚òÖ + B6 land (needs B5 modulo ‚òÖ, B6, + a Œº-naturality-slide ingredient).

## Do NOT retry
- The `.val`/presheaf-descent recipe for B4 is SUPERSEDED ‚Äî do not reconstruct it; the sheaf-level ‚òÖ route is strictly cleaner and proven to reduce.
- comm chain (`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`, `tensorPowAdd_comm`, `sectionsMul_mul_comm`) ‚Äî invertibility-gated FUTURE, no consumer (`GCommSemiring` unbuilt). NOT a prover lane.
- œá (`QuotScheme.lean`, 4 sorries) ‚Äî deferred to the cohomology leg.

## Coverage debt ‚Äî planner: author blueprint blocks (review cannot write prose)
Two NEW Lean decls in `SectionGradedRing.lean` have no `\label`/`\lean`/`\uses` (invisible to leandag):
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sheafification_map_unit_eq` (~L2440) ‚Äî proven, axiom-clean. Left-triangle `L.map Œ∑_P = Œµ_{LP}‚Åª¬π`. Uses: `Adjunction.left_triangle_components`, `Iso.comp_hom_eq_id`. (Mathlib-leaf-ish; could carry `\mathlibok`-anchored uses.)
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` (~L2458) ‚Äî NEW typed sorry, the sheaf-level core of B4. This is the new atom `lem:tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` now `\uses`. Uses (once closed): `tensorObjAssoc`, `tensorObjIso`, `Localization.Monoidal.{Œº_natural_left,Œº_natural_right,associator_hom_app}`, `sheafification_map_unit_eq`. **Add `\uses{lem:tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf}` to `lem:tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor`'s proof and relocate the bridge-telescoping sketch into ‚òÖ's block.**

## Stale comments flagged by lean-auditor (review cannot edit .lean ‚Äî for prover/plan)
- SGR L731‚Äì784: "NEXT-ITER HANDLES / objRestrict-style fix untried" block ‚Äî the fix is already implemented; comment is stale.
- SGR L2787: "the single remaining sorry of that chain" referring to B4 ‚Äî B4 is now proved (modulo ‚òÖ); stale.
- `RelativeSpec.lean` L701‚Äì706: docstring says `functor` body "is left as sorry" but the body is concrete; stale.

## Marker housekeeping done this iter (no action needed)
- Removed proof-block `\leanok` from `lem:tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` and `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` (both carry transitive `sorryAx` via ‚òÖ). **Heads-up to next review:** the deterministic `sync_leanok` may RE-ADD these next iter (its iter-013 `added:1` was the B4 proof block, triggered by the now-sorry-free own-body). If it does, re-strip ‚Äî they stay unproved until ‚òÖ closes. A durable fix would teach `sync_leanok` to use transitive `#print axioms`, but that is out of agent scope.
